name: known_guide_slot_1
notes: Replace with a published guide spacer from Doench, WU-CRISPR, CRISPRscan, or class-provided data.

name: known_guide_slot_2
notes: A second known guide prevents one unusual guide from controlling the comparison.

name: random_control_1
notes: Length-matched 20 nt control with moderate GC content.

name: random_control_2
notes: A second neutral sequence for comparison.

name: bad_poly_t_control
notes: Contains TTTT, a warning sign for U6-driven guide expression.

name: bad_high_gc_self_pair_control
notes: High GC sequence designed to fold strongly back on itself.
